situational_context: Running comeback day 50: 12 runs since May 3 (Run #12 completed June 21 — 7.5 km overreach from 4 km planned, suffer 36, biggest session of comeback). ACWR normalized to 1.20 (was 1.35 on June 14) — back in safe zone. HRV 7d avg stable at 35 ms (unchanged from 2 weeks ago, ~12% below mid-May baseline of 39-40; 3 of 7 days UNBALANCED). VO2max running improved to 40.8 (+0.2). Weight bounced to 103.67 kg (+1.05 kg from June 7) driven by caloric surplus averaging 3254 kcal/day vs 2500 target. Extreme heatwave in Paris (Météo-France red alert, 40°C Mon-Thu, easing to 37°C Sat, 35°C Sun). E-bike commuting remains active. No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026. Baby (Léonie, 5 months) — cohabitant sleep data unavailable this cycle.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Sur site — commute only (ebike or gravel)
Sur site — commute only (ebike or gravel)
Sortie vélo weekend — 60 min ebike Z1-Z2

recommendations.text: Caloric surplus is the #1 issue: 6-day average was 3254 kcal/day (+30% above 2500 target). This is the primary driver of the +1.05 kg weight rebound. Return to 2500 kcal target immediately. Prioritize protein to 150g/day (currently averaging 113g/day) to protect muscle during deficit.
recommendations.measurable: 7-day average calories ≤ 2600 kcal by June 29; protein avg ≥ 140g/day

recommendations.text: Post-Run #12 tissue monitoring: yesterday's 7.5 km (suffer 36) was the biggest run of the entire comeback — nearly double the planned 4 km. Monitor for Achilles, patellar, or tibial pain >24h. If any persistent pain, skip Run #13 on Wednesday and substitute with 30 min walk.
recommendations.measurable: No localized pain lasting >24h by Tuesday evening → green light for Run #13

recommendations.text: HRV remains static at 35 ms (12% below mid-May baseline of 39-40) for 2+ weeks. RHR is stable at 50.6 — per Buchheit 2014, this pattern (low HRV + stable RHR) more likely reflects autonomic adaptation than overtraining. Maintain current volume; do not increase until HRV trends toward 37+. Heatwave is an additional suppressor — expect HRV to stay depressed until temperatures normalize.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized pain (Achilles, patellar, tibial, fascia) lasting >24h after Jun 21 run
markers_to_watch.reason: 7.5 km at 102 kg is the highest impact load of the comeback; tissue tolerance is the bottleneck

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 32 ms or remains ≤ 34 ms for another week
markers_to_watch.reason: Static at 35 ms for 2+ weeks; heatwave will suppress further; need recovery signal before any load increase

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if weight exceeds 104 kg on next Withings reading
markers_to_watch.reason: Caloric surplus driving rebound; need to verify nutrition correction takes effect

markers_to_watch.threshold: Body battery < 30 or HRV < 28 on any day → cancel that day's planned session
markers_to_watch.reason: 40°C ambient temperature increases physiological strain; body battery and HRV will reflect compound heat + training stress
